title: Habracanthus haematodes
taxonomy: Habracanthus haematodes is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a type of herbaceous plant that belongs to the genus Habracanthus. The classification of Habracanthus haematodes is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Lamiales, Family: Acanthaceae, Genus: Habracanthus, Species: H. haematodes. The exact classification of Habracanthus haematodes may vary slightly depending on the source. Further research may be necessary to confirm the classification with absolute certainty.
